title: Greens repeat demand to ban Trump’s troops from Prestwick, following Iran attacks

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Greens have urged the Scottish Government to end US military access to publicly-owned Prestwick airport.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: Greens repeat demand to ban Trump’s troops from Prestwick, following Iran attacks - Scottish Greens Greens repeat demand to ban Trump’s troops from Prestwick, following Iran attacks

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: Swinney called out over ‘abdication of responsibility’ on Trump bombing flights Prestwick: Scottish Government must act following US flight revelations
